content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be restructured around a sparse episodic selection mechanism native to 2025 episodic memory transformer agents, where the active learning's query-for-information loop becomes the transformer's attention gating signal to only retrieve high-uncertainty past episodes for long-horizon planning. This replaces the standard dense storage of all agent experiences with an active curiosity-driven pruning mechanism that aligns memory storage with the agent's current learning objectives.
